name: WHMCS Client Management API
description: The WHMCS API allows you to perform operations and actions within WHMCS from external third party and custom code. This includes managing clients, domains, invoices, tickets, orders, and more. All API requests are made via POST to the api.php endpoint with authentication credentials and action parameters.
